title: All About Mobs
description: Set up your mob settings—whether on the server or client side—to add extra features to your game.
body:
**M1- [MOBNAME] [Command-Base] (nick) -Works on Client & Server**
**File Name: Download files named "M1"**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

 - Printable for DownloadIf you are a server owner, just upload it to the server; no need to install it on the client.
 
- - Printable for Download/hidemobopen "enemy" /hidemobopen "friend" Enables enemy or friendly mob name visibility.

 - Printable for Download/hidemobclose "enemy" /hidemobclose "friend" Disables enemy or friendly mob name visibility.

- Printable for Download/hideemobedistance "enemy" or "friend" Visibility distance in blocks: 5-10-15-20-25-30-35-40-45-50

</details>
**M1.5- [MOBNAME][Keyboard Shortcut-Based] (nick) -Just install it on the client — works everywhere.
File Name: Download files named "M1.5"
**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Printable for DownloadIf you are a server owner, just upload it to the server; no need to install it on the client.

- Printable for DownloadPress "insert" key to show enemy mob names  Press "insert" key again to hide them

- Printable for DownloadPress "PgUp" to increase the enemy mob name visibility distance.

- Printable for DownloadPress "delete" key to show friend mob names  Press "delete" key again to hide them

- Printable for DownloadPress "PgDn" to increase the friendly mob name visibility distance.


</details>

**M2- [MOB HEALTH][Keyboard Shortcut-Based] -Just install it on the client — works everywhere.
File Name: Download files named "M2"**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- If you are a server owner, just upload it to the server; no need to install it on the client.
- Press "F6" key to show  mob health  Press "F6" key again to hide them
- Press "F7" to increase the mob health bar visibility distance.
- Visibility distance in blocks: 5-10-15-20-25-30-35-40-45-50

</details>
**M3- [MOB HEALTH SETTING][Command-Base] -Works on Client & Server
File Name: Download files named "M3"**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

A mod to adjust mob health via commands.If you are a server owner, just upload it to the server; no need to install it on the client.
- /mobhealth "mob" "health" Example:/mobhealth "zombie" "1"
- /mobhealth default "mob" Restores the selected mob to normal health

</details>

**M4- [MOB DAMAGE Commands][Command-Base]  -Works on Client & Server
File Name: Download files named "M4"**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- If you are a server owner, just upload it to the server; no need to install it on the client.
- /mobdamage set "mob" "damage" Sets the custom damage value for a mob.
- /mobdamage default "mob"  Resets the given mob's damage to its default game value.
- /mobdamage default all Resets all modified mobs' damage values to their original default settings.

</details>
Redistribution and Permission:
To redistribute my mod, you need to come to my Discord address and obtain special permission. Please also credit me in the source code. This is required for versions I have granted permission for. Additionally, it is required that you clearly mention me on the promotional page.

Personal Use Only:
You may remix or edit textures for personal use, but modified versions cannot be distributed without my consent.

No Re-Uploads:
Do not re-upload this pack elsewhere. Link to the official source to maintain integrity and consolidate feedback.

Content Creation Allowed:
Screenshots and video recordings using this pack may be shared, with or without commercial intent. Attribution is not required but appreciated if you choose to give credit.

Server Use:
Server owners (or representatives) may distribute this pack as a server-side resource via the server's resource pack prompt. This excludes hosting it on forums or websites.

Prohibited Uses:

You may not include any part of this pack in paid products, such as other resource packs, mods, or commercial projects, without explicit written permission.

This pack may not be included in mash-ups, compilations, or third-party downloads without my explicit consent.

Commercial Use:
You may monetize content (e.g., videos, streams) created using this resource pack. However, direct monetization of the pack (e.g., selling it or modified versions) is strictly prohibited.

Intellectual Property Statement:
"This resource pack and all its contents are the intellectual property of [pickleakin]. Unauthorized distribution or use violates copyright law."

Disclaimer of Liability:
This resource pack is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. I am not responsible for any damage, loss, or issues arising from the use of this pack.

Revocation of Rights:
Failure to comply with these terms may result in the revocation of your right to use or distribute this resource pack.

Updates:
These terms apply to this and all future versions of the resource pack, unless otherwise specified.

License Modification:
"The permissions granted by me and this license are subject to future modifications. I reserve the right to change the terms of the license, add new conditions, and remove existing ones. Any changes made will be published in the official source and will be effective once updated."
